name: Pepperoni Pizza Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure carefully and place all ingredients, except pepperoni, in the bread machine pan in the order recommended by the manufacturer.
2. Add pepperoni at the raisin/nut signal, or 5 to 10 minutes before the last kneading cycle ends.
3. Select Basic/White cycle. Use Medium or Light crust color. Do not use delay cycles.
4. Remove baked bread from the pan and cool on a wire rack.
Note: This recipe is not recommended for 1 1/2 lb bread machines with cast aluminum pans in horizontal loaf shape.
